title: Saudi Seed Bank Accession (SAG)
description: One record per accession in the cold-storage seed bank. Source workbook: غرف التبريد سعد (cold rooms, Saad), May 2024 snapshot.

sag.description: Saudi Arabian Genebank accession number. Globally unique within this dataset.

cold_room_code.description: Internal cold-room storage code (1–8). Roughly maps to plant category but not strictly. رقم غرفة التبريد

local_ar.description: Local/cultivar name in Arabic. الاسم المحلي

common_ar.description: Common Arabic name of the species. الاسم بالعربي

species.description: Species epithet, sometimes with subspecies/variety qualifier.

scientific_name.description: Full binomial as recorded (often with author abbreviation).

en.description: Plant category translated. حقلي=field_crop, خضر=vegetable, بستانية=horticultural, بري=wild, طبي=medicinal

source.description: Where the seed came from: Market, Farm, Field, CIMMYT, ICARDA, ACSAD, ICRISAT, named institutions, individuals. Ditto marks (\") forward-filled from the previous row.

region.description: Region of collection (e.g., Al-Qaseem, Riyadh, Eastern Province). May contain international-nursery codes for accessions imported via CIMMYT/ICARDA — see flags.is_international_trial.

place.description: Specific place / city / country of collection.

weight_g.description: Stored seed weight in grams. الوزن بالجرام

germination_tests.description: Sequential germination viability tests (up to 6). Empty array if no test was recorded.

germination_pct.description: Germination rate as a percentage (typically 0–100). A handful of source rows have data-entry outliers >100 — preserved verbatim, not capped. نسبة الإنبات

germination_pct_raw.description: Original germination cell value as text (preserved before parsing).

iso.description: Test date in Gregorian ISO 8601 (converted from whatever the original was).

system.description: Source date system before normalization. `year_only` = bare 4-digit year (defaulted to Jan 1).

is_international_trial.description: True if this accession came from an international nursery / breeding trial (CIMMYT, ICARDA, ICRISAT, ACSAD, IBWSN, IDSN, IDYN, STEMRRSN, ESWYT, HTWYT, SAWYT, etc.) rather than a Saudi field collection.

is_backup_copy_label.description: True if the Region cell carried a 'نسخة 20XX/20XX' (copy/backup) label rather than a real region.

has_germination_data.description: Convenience flag: at least one germination test recorded.

raw.description: Original cell values from the workbook, preserved verbatim. Use these if you ever need to audit the cleaning.
